evidence.claim: The account status changes to locked.
evidence.fact: The application locks the account after 3 consecutive failed authentication attempts.

evidence.claim: Locking an account prevents the user from performing actions.
evidence.fact: When an administrator locks an account, the cardholder cannot perform any transactions until unlocked.

evidence.claim: There is an existing user management interface for admins.
evidence.fact: Through the admin interface, authorized users can toggle the locked status of any account instantly.
evidence.user_story_span: There is an existing user management interface for admins.

evidence.claim: The system allows admins to manually unlock user accounts.
evidence.fact: Administrators possess the ability to manually enable or disable a cardholder's access to the system.

evidence.claim: Locking an account prevents the user from logging in.
evidence.fact: After three successive authentication failures, the system permanently blocks access for that card.
evidence.user_story_span: prevents the user from logging in

evidence.claim: The user cannot log in when account is locked.
evidence.fact: The cardholder's account becomes inaccessible for any transaction until an administrator reactivates it.

evidence.claim: The account status changes to active.
evidence.fact: The cardholder's account becomes inaccessible for any transaction until an administrator reactivates it.

evidence.claim: The admin selects a user account and chooses to lock it.
evidence.fact: When an administrator locks an account, the cardholder cannot perform any transactions until unlocked.
evidence.user_story_span: select a user account and choose to lock it
